projects.name: Orbit-7 Satellite Bus
projects.description: Mid-class earth-observation platform — phase B, PDR closing in.

risks.title: EOL power margin tight
risks.mitigation: Trade study on cell vendor + duty-cycle review.

risks.title: Hot-case radiator under-sized
risks.mitigation: Adding louvres to baseline; thermal balance test scheduled.

risks.title: FSW timeline at risk
risks.mitigation: Early integration build, weekly scrum, heritage reuse.

risks.title: Reuse Mosaic-3 attitude FSW heritage
risks.mitigation: Negotiate IP transfer with sister mission, save ~6 weeks of FSW work.

risks.title: Volume discount on Li-ion cells
risks.mitigation: Combine PO with sister mission for 12% unit-price reduction.

risks.title: Earlier TVAC slot at partner facility
risks.mitigation: Partner facility offered Aug slot — could pull in TVAC by 4 weeks.

decisions.title: Down-select to BusFrame v3
decisions.rationale: Best mass and thermal envelope after trade study.

decisions.title: Reaction wheel: Vendor Bravo
decisions.rationale: Lifetime + lead time vs Vendor Alpha.

decisions.title: Li-ion 18650 cell — Vendor C
decisions.rationale: Heritage in similar LEO mission, 15-yr vendor support.

decisions.title: Single-aperture optical bench
decisions.rationale: Mass and integration win vs dual-aperture option.

decisions.title: PDR slipped 2 weeks
decisions.rationale: Customer requested additional FDIR work; risk register updated.

comments.text: Customer email confirming the 2-week slip is OK.

changes.title: Add FDIR scope to PDR data pack
changes.rationale: Customer mandated FDIR review at PDR.
changes.description: Expand FDIR analysis to include single-point failures of TT&C and AOCS.
changes.analysis: Two extra weeks of FSW + verification effort; offset by re-using Mosaic-3 heritage.

changes.title: Pull-in TVAC by 4 weeks
changes.description: Move TVAC campaign from week 24 to week 20.
changes.analysis: Cuts post-CDR margin to 2 weeks. Worth it if r_test materialises.

changes.title: Switch Li-ion vendor on batch order
changes.description: Combine PO with sister mission for 12% reduction.
changes.analysis: Slight requalification cost; net positive over the buy.

actions.notes: Pending customer review of options A and B.

openPoints.title: Battery capacity margin — should we add 10%?
openPoints.notes: Latest power budget shows EOL margin at 4.2%. Customer asked if we can push to 8% without exceeding mass.

steps.text: Get vendor quote on 10% larger cells

openPoints.title: Star tracker calibration approach
openPoints.notes: Vendor recommends two-pass; we have heritage with single-pass. Test results inconclusive at TID.

openPoints.title: Vendor lead time for solar arrays slipped
openPoints.notes: Original ATP was 14 weeks, now 22. Affects TVAC slot.

openPoints.title: FSW: CCSDS aux header support?
openPoints.notes: Customer requirement mid-cycle — feasible if we drop secondary header parse.

openPoints.title: Thermal louvre material — Al vs PEEK?
openPoints.notes: Mass cost vs thermal performance trade.

openPoints.title: Customer doc review cycle — 2 weeks ok?
PDR pack: include heritage justification for FSW reuse?
Test campaign owner — Marie or Diego?
openPoints.notes: Marie has TVAC experience but is overloaded. Diego is free but new.

openPoints.title: Should we ESCC-qualify the secondary MCU?
openPoints.notes: Cost ~€38k. Used only in non-flight HK loop.

decisions.rationale: Operational simplicity vs InfluxDB; volume tractable.

openPoints.title: Shard telemetry by mission or by time?
openPoints.notes: Current write rate ~3k/sec; time-shard is simpler, mission-shard is faster for per-mission queries.

openPoints.title: Browser support: drop IE11?
openPoints.notes: Ops insists. Engineering wants it gone.

openPoints.title: Internal beta with QA team — when?
openPoints.notes: Window between feature freeze and customer beta is tight.

openPoints.title: Datadog vs Grafana for observability?
openPoints.notes: Datadog has the budget but Grafana ties into existing infra.

openPoints.title: Add audit log for procedure execution?
openPoints.notes: Security review wants this before GA.

notes.pr_orbit:
Orbit-7 PDR push

  • PDR data pack final draft due 2026-07-07.
  • Customer feedback window: 2 weeks from delivery.
  • Key risks: r_supply (reaction wheel), r_sw (FSW timeline).

Decisions to make this month

  1. Star tracker calibration (single vs two-pass)
  2. Battery cell capacity bump
  3. Thermal louvre material

Last updated by Sofia, 2026-06-16.
notes.pr_helios:
Helios-2 beta plan

Internal beta with Ops on 2026-07-05, customer beta two weeks later.

  • Security review approval needed before customer beta.
  • Audit logging on backlog — must land before GA.
notes.pr_falcon:
Falcon P2 build

Open vendor questions: motor (T-Motor MN5008?), prop (13" vs 15"), battery cells.

Field tests targeted for 2026-08-16 — pre-flight checklist needed.

todos.text: Review PDR slides before customer meeting
Send Q3 budget summary to finance
